items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Elden Campbell. Clemson PF drafted 27th in 90 by LAL. Barely played as rook but played well v CHI in Finals. Improved but had rep of lacking intensity. Became solid C w/LAL & CHA from 96-02 (averaged 13 ppg 8 rpg). Ended as a good backup w/DET in 05. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Elden Campbell. Clemson PF drafted 27th in 90 by LAL. Barely played as rook but played well v CHI in Finals. Improved but had rep of lacking intensity. Became solid C w/LAL & CHA from 96-02 (averaged 13 ppg 8 rpg). Ended as a good backup w/DET in 05. RIP.
